build_system: None (WordPress plugin loaded directly). Lint with `php -l file.php` and `NODE_OPTIONS='' node --check viraseo/assets/js/admin.js`
test_framework: No formal test suite. Manual lint checks serve as verification.
build_command: php -l viraseo/viraseo.php && php -l viraseo/includes/Features/*.php && php -l viraseo/includes/Api/*.php && php -l viraseo/includes/Admin/Dashboard.php && php -l viraseo/includes/Database/Schema.php
test_command: find viraseo/includes viraseo/templates -name '*.php' -exec php -l {} \; | grep -v 'No syntax errors' || true
verification_instructions: 1. Run php -l on all modified PHP files. 2. Run node --check on admin.js. 3. All should report no syntax errors.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - PHP is available on the host.
environment_constraints: No WordPress runtime available - cannot run the plugin. Validation is limited to syntax checking (php -l, node --check). No Docker daemon available.
contribution_requirements: All UI in Persian (Farsi, RTL). Use existing patterns: check_ajax_referer('viraseo_nonce','nonce'), current_user_can('manage_options'). Register AJAX in constructor. Menu in Dashboard.php. Feature instantiation in viraseo.php.
key_patterns: PHP: namespace ViraSEO\Features, one class per feature in includes/Features/. AJAX: add_action('wp_ajax_viraseo_ACTION', [$this, 'method']) in constructor. JS: post('viraseo_ACTION', {data}, callback). AI: AiClient::chat($system, $user, $temp, $max_tokens) returns ['text'=>..., 'cost'=>..., 'tokens'=>...] or ['error'=>...]. Settings: Dashboard::get('key'). DB tables use $wpdb->prefix.'viraseo_' prefix with dbDelta in Schema.php. Templates in templates/admin/. Single CSS file: assets/css/admin.css. Single JS file: assets/js/admin.js (jQuery IIFE, const V = window.VS). Persian helpers: PersianText::format_number(), JalaliDate::format(). AiClient::clean_html() for AI HTML post-processing.
directory_structure: viraseo/ = plugin root. includes/Features/ = one PHP class per feature. includes/Api/ = API clients (AI, OAuth, Webhook). includes/Admin/ = Dashboard menu/assets. includes/Database/ = Schema (dbDelta). templates/admin/ = PHP template files for admin pages. assets/js/admin.js = single JS file (all frontend logic). assets/css/admin.css = single CSS file.
